MY.label: Burmese practical learner romanization
MY.description: Project style uses lowercase ASCII letters plus spaces, hyphen, straight apostrophe, colon and dot as tone/register or syllable markers. Do not mix accented Latin, curly apostrophes, compact dictionary punctuation or IPA symbols.

forbiddenPatterns.reason: Burmese colon tone/register marker must not be glued to the next syllable; use a space after ':' inside multi-syllable forms.
Burmese dot tone/register marker must not be glued to the next syllable; use a space after '.' inside multi-syllable forms.

validExamples: mi: hpou chaun thoun: pa. wa

KM.label: Khmer practical romanization
KM.description: Project style for Khmer practical romanization is lowercase ASCII Latin words separated by spaces. IPA-like symbols and accented source notation are not final card style.

forbiddenPatterns.reason: Khmer practical romanization must not mix IPA-like symbols into the final learner-facing project style.

TH.label: Thai learner romanization with tone diacritics
TH.description: Project style allows Latin learner romanization with tone marks and learner vowels; tone numbers and native Thai script are not final transcription.

forbiddenPatterns.reason: Thai learner romanization must use tone diacritics, not tone numbers.

LO.label: Lao learner romanization with tone diacritics
LO.description: Project style allows Latin learner romanization with tone marks and learner vowels; tone numbers and native Lao script are not final transcription.

forbiddenPatterns.reason: Lao learner romanization must use tone diacritics, not tone numbers.

HY.label: Armenian practical BGN/PCGN-style romanization
HY.description: Project style uses lowercase ASCII Latin BGN/PCGN-style romanization.

KA.label: Georgian national romanization
KA.description: Project style uses lowercase ASCII Latin Georgian national romanization; straight apostrophe is allowed for ejectives.

RU.label: Russian practical Latin transliteration
RU.description: Project style uses Latin transliteration, not Cyrillic copy or IPA.

BG.label: Bulgarian streamlined transliteration
BG.description: Project style uses official-style Latin transliteration, not Cyrillic copy or IPA.

KK.label: Kazakh practical Cyrillic-to-Latin transliteration
KK.description: Project style uses practical Latin transliteration from the current Kazakh Cyrillic display form.

ZH.label: Chinese Hanyu Pinyin with tone marks
ZH.description: Project style uses Hanyu Pinyin with tone marks; tone numbers are blocked elsewhere and here.

forbiddenPatterns.reason: Chinese pinyin must use tone marks, not tone numbers.

JA.label: Japanese Modified Hepburn with macrons
JA.description: Project style uses Latin Hepburn romanization with macrons where needed.

KO.label: Korean Revised Romanization
KO.description: Project style uses lowercase ASCII Revised Romanization.

HI.label: Hindi ISO 15919
HI.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

BN.label: Bengali ISO 15919
BN.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

NE.label: Nepali ISO 15919
NE.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

SI.label: Sinhala ISO 15919
SI.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

TA.label: Tamil ISO 15919
TA.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

TE.label: Telugu ISO 15919
TE.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

KN.label: Kannada ISO 15919
KN.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.

ML.label: Malayalam ISO 15919
ML.description: Project style uses ISO 15919 Latin transliteration.
